title: diplazium lanceum
intro: Diplazium lanceum, also known as the lance-leaf umbrella fern or umbrella fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Athyriaceae. It is native to Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. Diplazium lanceum can be prepared as an herbal remedy by infusing its leaves in hot water to make a tea, or by using its extracts in tinctures and capsules.
